code:
import io
import string
import list

mut nums: List<Int> = []

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_tok = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if is_ws
      if in_tok
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v * 2)
        when None
          ()
        end
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      if not in_tok
        start = i
        in_tok = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_tok
    let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v * 2)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
when None
  ()
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(out)
